---
title: "Hossein's Notes"
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


# Welcome

I'm Hossein Oliabak, a telecom network architect with expertise in data center and service provider technologies. Currently pursuing my Master's degree with research focus on network optimization and AI/ML applications in telecommunications.

## What You'll Find Here

- **Mathematics** — Linear algebra, calculus, and probability theory for network analysis
- **Network Engineering** — CCIE-level documentation and real-world implementations  
- **Research** — Graduate-level work on network optimization and machine learning
- **Code & Tools** — Scripts and utilities for network automation

These notes serve as both personal reference and knowledge sharing for the telecom community.

---

*Connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hosseinoliabak/)*
